title: Pungent Crunchy American Vegetable Skillet
description: A bitter and crunchy American dish featuring creme fraiche and wok-hei, perfect for adventurous eaters, this flexitarian friendly skillet is packed with flavor and texture.
instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
Add the Brussels sprouts and cook until browned and crispy, about 5 minutes.
Add the shredded red cabbage and cook until wilted, about 3 minutes.
Add the grated carrots and cook until they start to soften, about 2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the creme fraiche, soy sauce, and rice vinegar.
Pour the creme fraiche mixture over the vegetables and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Stir in the chopped scallions and cook for 1 minute.
Serve the skillet hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
